name: WoWTokenTracker
short: Track the WoW Token price over time (retail + classic) with history.
description: Periodically records the WoW Token price per region (retail and optionally classic) and shows the current price plus history (24h/7d change, min/max). Uses the shared Blizzard API key. A dashboard chart is planned. Bilingual (DE/EN).
author: Domekologe
install_msg:
Thanks for installing WoWTokenTracker!

Load it with `[p]load wowtokentracker`, then configure it via its commands or the PDC web dashboard (if installed).

This cog queries an outside service (Blizzard API) and needs Blizzard API credentials.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store any personal data about users. It stores only WoW Token price history and per-server configuration.
